trigger.description: ee remember invoked WITHOUT a workflow_id. Per G7's honest-unimplemented decision, workflow-less auto-linking is not implemented: ee returns status=no_workflow_required AND an info-severity degraded entry pointing at the explicit `ee memory link` surface.
trigger.invocation: ee remember 'My new memory' --workspace . --level procedural --kind rule --json

message_contains: Automatic memory linking requires a workflow context

notes: Status string is `auto_link_status: "no_workflow_required"` (a non-failure honest state). The degraded entry serves as the agent-readable signal that no workflow was supplied and explicit linking is the path forward.
